businessSummary.oneLiner: Government & enterprise AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform) tri-pillar model
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56% YoY), adjusted operating margin 32%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). Death cross formed (50-day SMA crossed below 200-day SMA) — bearish technical signal. AIPCon 9 (3/12) announced major partnerships with GE Aerospace, Polymarket, and others. 2026 guidance: revenue $7.18-7.20B (+61%).
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry — industrial data analytics)
AIP Bootcamps (5-day intensive pilot → enterprise-wide expansion)
keyProducts: Foundry — Enterprise data integration and analytics

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation. Maximum AI premium reflected

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS $1.34 expected. Still sector-highest level

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: 47% FCF margin. High cash conversion rate

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Not oversold despite death cross

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Major Partnerships Announced (3/12)
growthDrivers.description: BusinessWire (3/12): Multi-year contracts with GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI), Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), LG CNS. Medical, supply chain, and product development AI demos.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Integrity Platform — New TAM
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Joint development with Polymarket + TWG AI for Vergence AI sports integrity platform. New application area for prediction markets + AI analytics.

growthDrivers.title: 2026 Guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%) — Record Growth Outlook
growthDrivers.description: Tickeron: 2026 revenue guidance of $7.18-7.20B, +61% YoY. Significantly above prior consensus. AIP bootcamp strategy accelerating commercial revenue conversion.

growthDrivers.title: UBS Strong Buy Upgrade + Mizuho Buy Upgrade
growthDrivers.description: StockAnalysis (2/26): UBS upgraded to Strong Buy $180. Mizuho upgraded to Buy $195. Major IB sentiment turning positive.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ year track record in government/defense AI. Security clearance requirements create insurmountable entry barriers. 'Ontology' platform is uniquely positioned as an AI-human collaboration interface.

moats.description: Highest security clearances from US DoD and intelligence agencies. Competitors cannot enter.
AI/human agent 'tool factory.' Unrivaled in battlefield planning and target identification.
5-day intensive pilot converts enterprise customers, then expands company-wide. High conversion rate.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General-purpose approach vs Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Expanding into analytics platform territory

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Trails Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: Finbold: PLTR Death Cross Formed — $70 Crash Possible?
recentNews.significance: 50-day SMA crossed below 200-day SMA. Similar pattern in Oct 2021 preceded -60% decline

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9: GE Aerospace, Polymarket, LG CNS Major Partnerships
recentNews.significance: AI application expansion across medical, defense, supply chain, and sports integrity

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'PLTR Up 2,200% Since 2023 — Can the Run Continue?'
recentNews.significance: Valuation overheating concerns. Some Wall Street analysts suggest -68% downside possible

recentNews.headline: Rosenblatt Raises Target $150→$200 — Maintains Strong Buy
UBS Upgrades to Strong Buy — $180 Target
recentNews.significance: Major IB positive turn. FY2026 guidance praised

analystOpinions.notableComment: Buy consensus from 20 analysts. Average $193.75 (+28%). Rosenblatt $200 Strong Buy, UBS $180. One Sell at $50 — valuation overheating warning.

risks.title: Death Cross Formed — Bearish Technical Signal
risks.description: 50-day SMA ($153.85) crossed below 200-day SMA ($162.81). Similar Oct 2021 pattern preceded -60% decline. Further short-term downside possible.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation — P/E 240x, P/S 81x
risks.description: $4.48B revenue company at $361B market cap. Growth deceleration would cause severe multiple contraction.

risks.title: Share Dilution — +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Stock-based compensation causing ~5% annual dilution. Long-term shareholder value erosion.

risks.title: Government Budget Dependency — Political Risk
risks.description: Defense budget cuts would impact government contract revenue. DOGE-related political risks.

risks.title: Big Tech AI Platform Competition
risks.description: Microsoft, Google, Amazon AI platforms aggressively targeting enterprise market. Commercial revenue growth deceleration possible.

buyReasons.title: 2026 Guidance $7.2B (+61%) — Record Growth Rate
buyReasons.rationale: Guidance significantly exceeds prior consensus. AIP commercial revenue conversion accelerating builds growth conviction.

buyReasons.title: AIPCon 9 Major Partnerships — TAM Expansion
buyReasons.rationale: New industry entries: medical, sports, energy, aviation. Accelerating diversification away from government dependency.

buyReasons.title: Security Clearance Moat — Irreplaceable Positioning
buyReasons.rationale: Top defense/intelligence security clearances represent years of investment. New competitor entry virtually impossible.

buyReasons.title: 47% FCF Margin + Debt-Free — Strongest Financial Health
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M. 47% FCF margin enables self-funded growth.

overallOpinion: Palantir is the undisputed leader in AI data analytics, delivering FY2025 revenue of $4.48B (+56%) and guiding for $7.2B (+61%) in FY2026 — explosive growth.
However, the death cross formation and extreme P/E of 240x are serious risks. The 2021 precedent saw -60% decline after a similar pattern.

AIPCon 9's major partnership announcements demonstrate TAM expansion, but a $361B market cap on $4.48B revenue requires years of sustained high growth to justify. Buy for long-term investors, but watch for short-term technical weakness.

investmentVerdict.summary: Explosive growth (+61% guidance) + security clearance moat. Dollar-cost averaging recommended given death cross and extreme valuation.

threads.hook: PLTR death cross formed… 2021 nightmare repeat? 💀
threads.text:
Palantir's 50-day crossed below 200-day. In 2021, this led to -60% crash.

But this time is different? Guidance $7.2B (+61%), AIPCon landed GE & Polymarket deals.

P/E 240x vs 61% growth. How do you read this?

👉 investory.kro.kr/stock/PLTR/analysis/2026-03-15

telegram.hook: PLTR Death Cross vs 61% Growth — Who Wins? ⚔️
telegram.text:
📊 PLTR $150.95 (-1.66%)

⚠️ Technical Signal
• Death cross formed — 50-day SMA ($153.85) < 200-day SMA ($162.81)
• Similar 2021 pattern preceded -60% decline

🔥 Fundamentals
• FY2026 guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61% YoY)
• AIPCon 9: GE Aerospace, Polymarket, LG CNS major partnerships
• UBS Strong Buy $180, Rosenblatt $200
• FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B

⚠️ Risks: P/E 240x, ~5% annual dilution, government budget dependency

💡 Consensus: Buy, target $193.75 (+28%)

Is the death cross a trap or buying opportunity? 🤔
